name: Sweet'n' Sour Salmon Nuggets
recipeIngredient: 227 g Canned pineapple pieces (in natural juice)
1/2 Red pepper, de-seeded and cut into strips
6 Spring onions, trimmed and cut into 5cm / 2in lengths, then into thin strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the can of salmon.
2. Put the juice into a shallow microwave proof dish with the sherry. Heat on HIGH POWER for 2 minutes.
3. In a bowl, combine salmon, breadcrumbs, 1 teaspoon ginger, onion, and egg. Mash well until blended.
4. Divide the mixture into two batches.
5. Using lightly floured hands and a soup spoon, shape rough balls from the first batch and drop them into the hot stock and sherry. Cook uncovered on HIGH POWER for 2 minutes. Turn nuggets over and return to oven. Cook on HIGH POWER for a further 2 minutes. Transfer cooked nuggets to a plate. Set aside.
6. Repeat step 5 with the second batch using the same cooking liquid. Set aside.
7. Strain the cooking liquid through a sieve into a large jug. Add remaining ginger, apple juice, pineapple in its juice, pepper, onions, honey, vinegar, tomato puree, and cornflower. Mix well.
8. Cook sauce on HIGH POWER for 1 minute, stirring, then cook for a further 1 minute or until thickened.
9. Reheat nuggets for 2 minutes on HIGH POWER. Serve with rice or noodles and sweet 'n' sour sauce.
Serves 4. Approx. 435 kcals per serving
